title: Mock digs to global stage: WashU archaeologist Patania mentors Lego League teams
summary_en: In August, global robotics competition First Lego League challenged children to design a robot to help archaeologists. The task demands skills in engineering, design and, first and foremost, archaeology. Enter WashU environmental archaeologist Ilaria Patania, who helped dozens of middle school competitors.
title_cn: 从模拟考古挖掘走向国际舞台：圣路易斯华盛顿大学考古学家帕塔尼亚指导乐高联盟参赛队伍

title: 2026 Olin Award recognizes continued excellence in AI research
summary_en: This year’s Olin Award winner is Xiang Hui, who studied how an artificial intelligence (AI) tool can improve outcomes in the real estate market for buyers and sellers. It’s one of many AI-focused research projects making an impact at Olin.
title_cn: 2026年度奥林奖表彰人工智能研究领域持续取得的卓越成果
summary_cn: 无对应待翻译原文内容

title: Supporting runners every step of the way
summary_en: WashU Medicine serves as the official medical provider — and more — at the Greater St. Louis Marathon.
title_cn: 全程支持跑步选手每一步

title: Naseh receives William H. Danforth St. Louis Confluence Award
summary_en: The Brown School’s Mitra Naseh, founding director of its Forced Migration Initiative, is committed to working with local nonprofits to foster a sense of well-being and belonging among the region’s immigrants and refugees.
title_cn: 纳塞赫荣获威廉·H·丹福思圣路易斯汇流奖
